---
title: "Part 5：现代计算机视觉"
author: jshn9515
date: 2026-05-05
date-modified: today
comments: false

listing:
  contents:
    - ../ch11-vision-transformers/*.qmd
  sort: title asc
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, date]
  date-format: iso

open-graph:
  title: part5-modern-computer-vision
  description: "Part 5: Modern Computer Vision"
---
